display_rules: Only show dogs actively checking out.
Never expose owner names, phone numbers, addresses, billing details, notes, or medical data.
Lobby display must read from internal cached/synced data only, never directly from Gingr.

asset_usage.logos/fitdog-logo-placeholder.svg: Temporary Fitdog-style logo placeholder. Replace with official transparent logo if available.
asset_usage.ui/featured-card-orange-glow.png: Featured current checkout dog card background.
asset_usage.dogs/png/*.png: Fallback dog profile avatars. Replace with Gingr dog profile photos when available.
asset_usage.promos/spa-day-sundays-banner.png: Promotional banner sample for services/events area.
asset_usage.icons/png/*.png: Fallback PNG icons for quick implementation.
